context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the gettext-i18n instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify `.po` files** — confirm new `msgid` entries appear with empty `msgstr` values

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Don't translate error messages meant for logs** — only translate user-facing text

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use domain-specific contexts** — `dgettext("errors", "Not found")` for different domains

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: gettext("Save")                              # Default domain
